resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word.isupper() or word.islower() or (word[0].isupper() and word[1:].islower())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses built-in string methods to check for all uppercase, all lowercase, or first letter uppercase and rest lowercase. It has a high efficiency due to the use of optimized string methods and a constant space complexity.
